abilities.name: Ash Strike
abilities.description: A basic physical attack wreathed in ash particles.

abilities.name: Ember Dash
abilities.description: A swift lunging attack that leaves a trail of embers.

abilities.name: Ironhide
abilities.description: Hardens skin, boosting DEF by 40% for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Memory Drain
abilities.description: Siphons fragments of the target's memory, dealing WILL-based damage and reducing their SPD.

abilities.name: Willfire
abilities.description: Channels the creature's will to power into a concentrated blast.

abilities.name: Tectonic Slam
abilities.description: A devastating ground-pound. Very heavy—wins most clashes but extremely slow.

abilities.name: Death Whisper
abilities.description: A silent scream that erodes the target's poise. Fast and light.

abilities.name: Phase Shift
abilities.description: Briefly phases between reality layers, dodging the next attack entirely.

abilities.name: Thornbind
abilities.description: Entangles target in corrupted thorns. Deals damage and prevents swapping for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Epoch Weight
abilities.description: Channels the weight of centuries into a single crushing force. The heaviest attack in the game.

abilities.name: Severed Thread
abilities.description: Cuts the metaphysical bond between target and its ally, preventing Bond Resonance for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Pack Howl
abilities.description: Boosts both allies' ATK by 20% for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Requiem Toll
abilities.description: A funeral bell that deals massive damage and has a 30% chance to instantly break posture.

abilities.name: Overgrowth
abilities.description: Explosive plant growth engulfs the battlefield, hitting both enemies.

abilities.name: Molten Core
abilities.description: Unleashes inner volcanic energy. Deals fire damage and burns for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Boundary Walk
abilities.description: Shifts element type to counter the target's primary element for 3 turns. ThresholdKin exclusive.

abilities.name: Ancient Memory
abilities.description: Channels pre-divine knowledge into devastating reality distortion. DeepOne exclusive.

abilities.name: Forgetting Touch
abilities.description: Target forgets one random ability for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Silent Hymn
abilities.description: A forbidden song that deals damage and silences the target for 1 turn.

abilities.name: Possessive Embrace
abilities.description: Wraps the target in suffocating affection. Deals damage and prevents fleeing.

abilities.name: Primordial Quake
abilities.description: The earth remembers what it was before the gods. Transcendence-only ability. Hits all enemies.
